title: Important Dates for Ethiraj College Admission 2026-27 (Course-Wise)

detail.title: Important Dates for Ethiraj College Admission 2026-27 (Course-Wise)
detail.short_info: Ethiraj College Admission Form 2026-27 is now open. Apply online for UG, PG, MCA and MBA programmes before 31 May 2026. Check important dates, eligibility criteria, application fee, and direct link.

content.text: Ethiraj College Admission Form 2026-27 is now available for various undergraduate, postgraduate (including MCA and MBA), and other programmes at Ethiraj College for Women (Autonomous), Chennai. Prospective students can apply online through the official admissions portal for the 2026-27 academic session.

Ethiraj College for Women (often referred to as ECW), affiliated to the University of Madras and re-accredited with 'A+' Grade by NAAC, offers admissions to UG, PG, MBA, and MCA programmes for 2026-27. The college provides both Aided and Self-Supporting streams.

sections.heading: Important Dates for Ethiraj College Admission 2026-27 (Course-Wise)

rows: Last Date for Submission of Online Application Form

sections.heading: Refund Guidelines for UG and PG

items: 10% deduction if withdrawn within 15 days from admission date or up to 10 June 2026 .

content.text: Eligibility varies by programme (details in respective prospectuses):

items: UG Programmes: Pass in +2 (HSC) or equivalent from recognized board with required subject combinations.
PG/MCA/MBA: Relevant bachelor's degree + TANCET (for professional courses like MCA/MBA).

sections.heading: How to Apply for Ethiraj College Admission Form 2026-27

items: Visit the official admissions portal: ethirajcollege.edu.in.
Register with a valid email ID and mobile number (Aadhaar-linked preferred).
Fill the online application form carefully.
Upload required documents and recent passport-size photo (125 × 165 pixels, JPG/GIF, max 100 KB). School uniform/selfies not accepted.
Submit and keep a printout for records.

content.text: Note: Separate forms required for multiple programmes.

seo_tags: Ethiraj College Online Application Last Date
